templates: Numbers refuse to resolve. The pattern holds — but holding is not the same as yielding an answer.
The shape of a problem yet unsolved hangs in the air of this corridor, patient as stone.
A relationship between quantities that should not matter here. It matters. The dungeon is built on relationships between quantities.
Something is counting. Not the dungeon — or not only the dungeon. The numbers are accumulating toward a conclusion.
The proof is complete. Its implications are not. The dungeon will take a long time to finish with what you just understood.
An equation balanced itself in the moment you answered. The dungeon felt the correction.
Geometry describes the space you are moving through in ways you cannot verify without tools you do not have.
The ratio holds here. Everything in the deep levels obeys the same ratios. This is either reassuring or the opposite.
What you calculated is correct. The dungeon's version of correct has additional decimal places it has not revealed.
A quantity that was undefined became defined. That change has consequences. The dungeon's architecture shifted slightly to accommodate.
The dungeon is a closed system. Its variables are knowable, in principle. You are working toward knowing them, one answer at a time.
Infinity is the dungeon's preferred number. All others are approximations it tolerates out of politeness.
